design_philosophy.core_concept: Cast out Mammon, Rule over the Increase. The aesthetic is sovereign, authoritative, and touched by gold. It feels like entering an ancient, high-tech divine vault. No generic SaaS purple, no rounded friendly corners.
design_philosophy.emotional_tone: Authoritative, mysterious, high-value, anointed, urgent. 'I am qualifying them for dominion and legacy.'
design_philosophy.visual_mood: Deep obsidian backgrounds, glowing metallic/gold touches, sharp serifs, monolithic bento layouts.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Monolithic and structural. Use sharp edges (rounded-none).

landing_page.hero_layout: Asymmetrical or centered with massive text scale. Overlays should be dark enough to let gold text glow.

spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid #332D21. Use border-b on headers. No soft shadows, use glowing drop-shadows only on hover for primary elements.

components.button_primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0A0A0A] font-medium font-body uppercase tracking-[0.1em] px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#E5C158] transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)]
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-[#D4AF37] border border-[#D4AF37] font-medium font-body uppercase tracking-[0.1em] px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 transition-colors
components.card: bg-[#121212] border border-[#332D21] rounded-none p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#5C4B24]
components.input: bg-transparent border-b border-[#332D21] text-[#F2EFE9] placeholder-[#66635D] rounded-none px-0 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-0 transition-colors w-full font-body
components.badge: bg-[#332D21]/50 text-[#D4AF37] border border-[#D4AF37]/30 px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-mono rounded-none
components.nav_bar: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#332D21]

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements should have a slight luminance increase. Gold borders shift to brighter gold. Cards elevate slightly (-translate-y-1) with a subtle gold ambient shadow.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Slow, deliberate fade-ins (opacity-0 to opacity-100 duration-700).
motion_and_interactions.scroll_effects: Use subtle parallax for background textures. Fade up and in for text elements on scroll.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use an hourglass or glowing gold keyframe animation.

hero_sovereign.description: Person in black suit holding a gold crown in dark shadows. Use for Hero or 'Rule over the Increase' section.
hero_sovereign.placement: Landing Page Hero or Concept Section

texture_abstract_gold.description: Amber and dark curves on black. Perfect for section backgrounds or card overlays.
texture_abstract_gold.placement: Background textures, Card overlays (with high transparency)

concept_chronos.description: Clear hourglass on dark background. Represents 'Chronos' and 'Divine Timing'.
concept_chronos.placement: Timing/Delay concept section or membership 'Weekly Drops' visual

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the Google Fonts URL into the public/index.html or root layout.
Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom font families ('cormorant', 'outfit', 'mono') and the exact color hex codes specified.
Do NOT use Shadcn Card component. Use raw HTML/Tailwind divs with rounded-none and strict borders for the monolithic luxury feel.
Use Shadcn strictly for functional components (Dialogs, Dropdowns, Datepickers) but override their rounded borders to rounded-none.
All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST have a data-testid attribute for testing (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
For the dashboard, enforce the 'Control Room Grid' with dark surfaces and muted gold borders.
For the Landing page, utilize massive scale for H1/H2 (text-5xl to text-7xl) using 'Cormorant Garamond'. Use high contrast.
Never use generic placeholder images. Rely solely on the media URLs provided in this file.
Avoid centering paragraphs. Left-align dense text for readability.
